entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The legume species being studied for dwarfism and natural outcrossing.

entities.name: DWARFISM
entities.description: A recessive trait characterized by short plant stature in pigeonpea.

entities.name: TALLNESS
entities.description: A dominant trait characterized by tall plant stature in pigeonpea.

entities.name: ICRISAT CENTER
entities.description: The research facility where the genetic studies on pigeonpea were conducted.

entities.name: TALL PLANT STATURE
entities.description: A phenotypic characteristic used as a genetic marker to study natural outcrossing.

entities.name: NATURAL OUTCROSSING
entities.description: The process of pollen transfer between different genotypes in a natural environment.

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The environmental timing during which seeds were harvested and progenies were grown.

entities.name: F2 GENERATION
entities.description: The second filial generation of dwarf pigeonpea plants used for seed harvesting.

entities.name: F3 GENERATION
entities.description: The third filial generation of pigeonpea plants used to estimate outcrossing.

entities.name: OPEN POLLINATION
entities.description: The method of pollination used to obtain seeds from F2 dwarf plants.

relationships.description: used as a genetic marker to study
method used to obtain seeds from
